3121680.name: Warcoven
3121680.description:
Combat

Warcoven's turn base combat takes place on a board formed of hexagonal tiles and populated by natural and magical obstacles and effects. Players deploy their units strategically before facing off using skills, spells and blades.

Units

Players must choose their warriors wisely and combine their abilities in combat to surprise and outwit their opponent with magical combinations.

Skills & Spells

Warcoven is a world taken over by growing spellcasters of all type abusing the natural elements to their will to cause storms, wildfires and other catastrophes.

Arcade Mode

The arcade mode aims to present the combat to players in a 1v1 online or offline match. Here, players can freely pick their units to experiment and compete in friendly matches with their friends using join codes.
